tasks.title: Fix diff_str() IgnoreOptions Bug
tasks.description: The diff_str() method parses strings to Buffers but does not apply IgnoreOptions configured on the builder. String comparison ignores builder options. Must apply ignore_foreground, ignore_background, and ignore_attributes when set on the builder.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify diff_str() applies ignore_foreground when set
AddUnitTest: verify diff_str() applies ignore_background when set
AddUnitTest: verify diff_str() applies ignore_attributes when set
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing diff_str() behavior is preserved for default case
tasks.impl_notes: Modify diff_str() in src/diff.rs to pass IgnoreOptions to the comparison logic. The method currently parses strings to Buffers but ignores the builder's ignore_* settings.

tasks.title: Make Snapshot Directory Configurable
tasks.description: SNAPSHOT_DIR is hardcoded to 'snapshots' and is not configurable. Need to allow configuration via environment variable RATATUI_TESTING_SNAPSHOT_DIR while defaulting to 'snapshots'.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify RATATUI_TESTING_SNAPSHOT_DIR env var is read when set
AddUnitTest: verify default 'snapshots' is used when env var not set
AddIntegrationTest: verify load_snapshot() and save_snapshot() work with custom directory
tasks.impl_notes: In src/snapshot.rs, replace hardcoded SNAPSHOT_DIR with a function that checks the environment variable first, falling back to default 'snapshots'. Use std::env::var_or.

tasks.title: Make crossterm a Required Dependency
tasks.description: crossterm is marked optional = true in Cargo.toml but is required for PTY event injection functionality. Remove from optional features and ensure it remains as a required dependency with version 0.28.
test_criteria: RunTestSuite: cargo build -p ratatui-testing --all-features succeeds
RunTestSuite: cargo test -p ratatui-testing succeeds without changes
AddRegressionTest: ensure all crossterm-dependent tests pass
tasks.impl_notes: In Cargo.toml, move crossterm from optional = true dependencies to required dependencies with version = "0.28". Update documentation to reflect this is a required dependency.

tasks.title: Document Windows PTY Limitation
tasks.description: Windows PTY implementation is a stub that returns errors. Add clear doc comments explaining the limitation, include helpful error message pointing to documentation, and PRD reference.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify #[cfg(windows)] implementation returns descriptive error
AddRegressionTest: ensure Unix PTY implementation is unaffected
tasks.impl_notes: Add doc comment to #[cfg(windows)] block in src/pty.rs explaining Windows PTY is not supported, returns NotSupported error, and references PRD documentation.

tasks.title: Complete DialogRenderTester Tests
tasks.description: DialogRenderTester tests are incomplete. Missing tests for assert_render_result() and assert_empty_state() helper functions. Per FR-DIALOG-007 and FR-DIALOG-008, tests should verify border and content presence.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify assert_render_result() helper function works correctly
AddUnitTest: verify assert_empty_state() helper function works correctly
AddIntegrationTest: verify border presence check in rendered dialog
AddIntegrationTest: verify content presence check in rendered dialog
tasks.impl_notes: In tests/dialog_tests.rs, add tests for assert_render_result() and assert_empty_state(). Use TestBackend to verify rendered output contains expected borders and content.

tasks.title: Export ChildProcess in lib.rs
tasks.description: ChildProcess should be exported in lib.rs so users can access it. This task has been resolved.
test_criteria: RunTestSuite: verify ChildProcess is publicly accessible from the crate
tasks.impl_notes: RESOLVED: ChildProcess is now exported in lib.rs. No further work needed.

tasks.title: Fix with_temp_dir and capture_stdout/capture_stderr
tasks.description: with_temp_dir() should return (Self, PathBuf) tuple and capture_stdout()/capture_stderr() methods should be implemented. This task has been resolved.
test_criteria: RunTestSuite: verify with_temp_dir() returns correct tuple type
RunTestSuite: verify capture_stdout() captures output correctly
RunTestSuite: verify capture_stderr() captures output correctly
tasks.impl_notes: RESOLVED: with_temp_dir() returns (Self, PathBuf) tuple as per implementation. capture_stdout() and capture_stderr() methods are now implemented. No further work needed.
